description.ko: 고대 나무들이 광섬유 케이블과 빛나는 신경망으로 이루어진 숨 막히는 풍경으로, 네온 빛 황혼 아래 유기적 성장과 수정 같은 디지털 구조가 조화를 이룹니다.
description.en: A breathtaking landscape where ancient trees are composed of fiber-optic cables and glowing neural networks, blending organic growth with crystalline digital structures under a neon twilight.

prompt: FLORA-9 style, cinematic wide shot, digital nature, holographic flowers blooming with pixel particles, glowing roots made of flowing data streams, translucent leaves with circuit patterns, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, synthwave color palette.
